    Hyderabadi 
    Style Fusion Biryani

    Discover
    Our Story

    We specialize in fusion of Indian food; especially DUM Biryani, Tandoor Grills, South Indian cuisine filled with aromatic and authentic taste. Our signature dish is the DUM Biryani & the oven grills with home ground spices and cooked on covered coal pot to get the flavor.

    Authentic taste has been given top priority while designing the menu. All our dish entails of richest spices to offer the most authentic flavor possible. Hence, we believe in not only providing delicious & quality food but also good customer service.

    The freshness of its products and the use of secret home-made recipes bring the food lovers in search of those unique dishes that can be found only at Biryani Brews.

    Treating your loved ones never felt so good!

    At Biryani Brews, our commitment to freshness and our use of secret recipes, crafted from scratch, attract food enthusiasts in search of unique dishes found only here. Join us to experience culinary delights that are truly one-of-a-kind.

    HALAL CERTIFIED

    Eco friendly packaging:

    We are the first one to serve biryani in a eco conscious packaging.

    Authentic spices:

     We create our own recipe with the right mix of raw spices to attain distinct flavors. 

    Fresh Meat:

    We use only fresh mutton and chicken for our Biryani.

    Good for you ingredients:

    We use sunflower oil and pure ghee. No MSG. No artificial colouring and flavours.

    WHAT PEOPLE SAY

    Prakash Rajamohan
    Biryani taste here is good and consistent. After a long time, I have really enjoyed the homely taste of both chicken and mutton biryani. Also felt very comfortable even after eating my full portion which is something good. I would definitely recommend Biryani Brews if you want to taste authentic Indian biryani.
    lakkireddy.sailaja sudha
    The food is absolutely wonderful because of its unique flavor and authentic taste. Especially my kids also loved it a lot , honestly commented that“ the taste buds go for a vacation" after eating Biryani here😊. The delivery packaging and quantity standards are superb 👌 and a great value for the price. We all highly recommend Biryani Brews👍.
    Sonali S
    This place has my highest recommendation.
    This biryani is so flavourful, can’t express in words.
    After searching for a while, my search for biryani ends here. I will be asking my frns to try their chicken dum biryani set. It’s yummy, tasty, flavourful, just amazing. Go try urself.
